case_title: GOODWIN EVELYN et al VS RANDAZZO, FRANK

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOODWIN EVELYN BOROS SANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANDAZZO, FRANK $1,695.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,703.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVE CARPETS WERE DAMAGED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF NOV-30-1992, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT RANDAZZO, FRANK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,845.00 FILED BY GOODWIN EVELYN BOROS SANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT RANDAZZO, FRANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RANDAZZO, FRANK HEARING SET FOR NOV-02-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT RANDAZZO, FRANK HEARING SET FOR NOV-30-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RANDAZZO, FRANK
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RANDAZZO, FRANK
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: NOV-02-1992 AS TO DEFENDANT RANDAZZO, FRANK
